title: Permissions
excerpt: Permissions - When a board is shared to “GUESTS”- there is only one level of permissions to opt into - there needs to separate permissions for GUESTS.  This would cut down on mirroring and linking boards.  Seems like thi…

posts.author: redbarn (Tracy Lea)
posts.cookedHtml: Permissions - When a board is shared to “GUESTS”- there is only one level of permissions to opt into - there needs to separate permissions for GUESTS. This would cut down on mirroring and linking boards. Seems like this should be an easy one!
